Very soon there are going to be more AI agents than humans making transactions.

They can’t open a bank account, but they can own a crypto wallet. Think about it.

title: Safety should be the top 1 priority for anyone using AI Agents.
snippet: SOON - Solana Optimistic Network (Mainnet Arc) (@soon_svm): Safety should be the top 1 priority for anyone using AI Agents. @Readyclaw_, launched through AI Capital Market, has safety scanning implemented natively. Try it out now at https://t.co/WnK9w0somT.

quotedUser.name: Readyclaw
quotedUser.text:
Welcome, Tencent. The more skill marketplaces, the better. 

But anyone “raising a lobster” deserves honesty: when we scanned 14,710 skills on ClawHub, only a few hundred were auto-flagged. We knew that was not safety, it just meant the scanner was blind.
